# DriveEase Copilot Instructions

- This workspace contains a React + Vite car rental platform UI.
- Keep changes aligned with the premium dark SaaS design system in `tailwind.config.js` and `src/index.css`.
- Preserve role-based routing for user, admin, and vendor portals in `src/App.jsx`.
- Reuse shared UI primitives from `src/components/common.jsx` and the portal shell in `src/components/PortalLayout.jsx`.
- Prefer mock data from `public/mock/*.json` when backend APIs are not available.
- Keep the app responsive, accessible, and consistent across all portals.
- Use concise, purposeful changes and avoid reintroducing starter Vite content.
